source: Datamined DT_ManufactoringRecipies + DT_ManufactoringGroups (The Forever Winter 0.9.3.9.2); ingredient/product names via DT_TagToRowHandle -> ItemDetailsData/DanglyDetailsData.
note: Vanilla crafting/manufacturing recipes as decoded from the game. Craft times are real-time. Use the dataset toggle to overlay the Heavy Rifles Rebalance recipes.

groups.name: Railgun Weapon
groups.details:
Use components to build Railgun Parts.

Each Railgun Requires:

1 Turret Base,
1 Railgun Weapon,
1 Railgun Ammo Supply.

These 3 Parts must be carried by
3 different Scavs.

Place the Base 1st,
Attach the Weapon 2nd,
And then attach the Ammo 3rd.

Once assembled, The Railgun is usable
and cannot be disassembled / retrieved.

Railgun attacks on larger foes may
yield new, valuable loot drops...
